spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Doric casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: animal messenger, beast sense, speak with animals
2e/day: cure wounds, entangle, faerie fire, thunderwave

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Doric makes two Shaped Claw or Sling attacks. She can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

actions.name: Shaped Claw
entries: *Melee Spell Attack:* +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Sling
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* +6 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. *Hit:* 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

bonusActions.name: Change Shape (5/Day)
entries: Doric magically transforms into a Beast with a challenge rating of 3 or less or into an owlbear (see the Monster Manual).

Doric can remain in that form for up to 2 hours. She can choose whether her equipment falls to the ground, melds with her new form, or is worn by the new form. Doric reverts to her true form if she is incapacitated or dies. She can revert to her true form using a bonus action.

While Doric is transformed, her stat block is replaced by the stat block of that form, except she keeps her current hit points, her hit point maximum, this bonus action, her alignment, and her Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores.

reactions.name: Fiery Rebuke (3/Day)
entries: When Doric is damaged by a creature that she can see within 60 feet of herself, she magically engulfs the creature in flames. The creature must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 16 (3d10) fire damage on failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Edgin Darvis
skills: deception: +7, performance: +10, persuasion: +10, sleight of hand: +6

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Edgin casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: friends, message
1/day: suggestion
3e/day: charm person, disguise self

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Edgin makes two Reinforced Lute or Shortsword attacks.

actions.name: Reinforced Lute
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage plus 11 (2d10) thunder damage.

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 11 (2d10) thunder damage.

actions.name: Disorienting Words
entries: Edgin magically taunts up to three creatures he can see within 60 feet of himself. Each creature must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or take 10 (3d6) psychic damage and have disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the start of Edgin's next turn.

reactions.name: Inspiring Words (3/Day)
entries: When a creature Edgin can see within 60 feet of himself fails an ability check, an attack roll, or a saving throw, Edgin grants the creature magical encouragement. The creature can roll a d8 and add the number rolled to the total, potentially turning the failure into a success.

name: Forge Fitzwilliam
skills: acrobatics: +5, deception: +11, investigation: +8, persuasion: +11, sleight of hand: +5, stealth: +8

traits.name: Disarming Charm
entries: While Forge isn't wearing armor, his AC includes his Charisma modifier.

traits.name: Double-Cross
entries: If Forge hits a creature friendly to him with an attack roll, the attack is automatically a critical hit.

traits.name: Evasion
entries: If Forge is subjected to an effect that allows him to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, he takes no damage if he succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if he fails, provided he isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Forge makes two Dagger attacks, two Heavy Crossbow attacks, or one of each.

actions.name: Dagger
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage plus 24 (7d6) poison damage, and the target is poisoned until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage plus 24 (7d6) poison damage. If the target is a creature, it has disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the start of Forge's next turn.

bonusActions.name: Cunning
entries: Forge takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action, or he gives himself advantage on the next attack roll he makes before the end of this turn.

reactions.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: Forge halves the damage he takes from an attack that hits him. He must be able to see the attacker.

traits.name: Reckless
entries: At the start of her turn, Holga can gain advantage on melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against her have advantage until the start of her next turn.

traits.name: Special Equipment
entries: Holga carries a darksteel greataxe, a magic weapon that grants her resistance to lightning damage while she carries it (included above).

traits.name: Unarmored Defense
entries: While Holga isn't wearing armor, her AC includes her Constitution modifier.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Holga makes three Darksteel Greataxe or Improvised Weapon attacks, in any combination.

actions.name: Darksteel Greataxe
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 10 (1d12 + 4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Improvised Weapon
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., or range 20/60 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

bonusActions.name: Wrestle
entries: Holga shoves a creature within 5 feet of herself. That creature must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be moved 5 feet into an unoccupied space of Holga's choice.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: Simon has advantage on saving throws he makes to avoid or end the charmed condition on himself, and magic can't put him to sleep.

traits.name: Special Equipment
entries: Simon carries a bag of holding, two pairs of sending stones, and a deathly token (see Spellcasting).

traits.name: Wild Magic
entries: When Simon takes 20 or more damage from a single source or takes damage from a critical hit, he must roll on the Wild Magic Surge table in the Player's Handbook.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Roll a d6. On a roll of 1, Simon must roll on the Wild Magic Surge table in the Player's Handbook. On a roll of 2 or higher, Simon casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: mage hand, minor illusion, prestidigitation, speak with dead (Simon must be holding his deathly token to cast this spell)
2e/day: fog cloud, mage armor, magic missile, spider climb
1e/day: Bigby's hand, major image

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Simon makes three Quarterstaff or Chaos Bolt attacks. He can replace one attack with one use of Spellcasting.

actions.name: Quarterstaff
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 2 (1d6 - 1) bludgeoning damage, or 3 (1d8 - 1) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands, plus 11 (2d10) force damage.

actions.name: Chaos Bolt
entries: *Ranged Spell Attack:* +6 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. *Hit:* 14 (2d10 + 3) damage of a random type determined by rolling a d8: 1, acid; 2, cold; 3, fire; 4, force; 5, lightning; 6, poison; 7, psychic; 8, thunder.

reactions.name: Sheltering Shield (3/Day)
entries: When Simon or another creature he can see within 10 feet of himself would take damage, he conjures a shimmering, 10-foot-radius sphere of magical force centered on himself. Creatures inside the sphere have resistance to the damage that triggered this reaction.

traits.name: Special Equipment
entries: Sofina wears a magic robe that grants her a +2 bonus to AC and a +1 bonus to saving throws (included above).

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Sofina casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18):
At will: mage hand, message, prestidigitation
2e/day: bestow curse, Bigby's hand, dimension door, mage armor, Otiluke's resilient sphere, thunderwave
1e/day: Evard's black tentacles, finger of death, time stop

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Sofina makes three Necrotic Strike attacks.

actions.name: Necrotic Strike
entries: *Melee Spell or Ranged Spell Attack:* +10 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft., one target. *Hit:* 32 (5d10 + 5) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Swarm of Meteors (1/Day)
entries: Sofina magically calls down a meteor swarm that detonates in four 40-foot-radius spheres, each one centered on a point she can see within 1 mile of herself. These spheres can overlap. Each creature in one or more of these spheres must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) fire damage and 35 (10d6) bludgeoning damage on a failed saving throw, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature in multiple spheres takes this damage only once.

bonusActions.name: Summon Wraith (1/Day)
entries: Sofina magically summons the spirit of a Thayan assassin, which appears as a wraith (see the Monster Manual). The summoned wraith appears in an unoccupied space within 60 feet of Sofina, whom it obeys. The summoned wraith takes its turn immediately after Sofina. It lasts for 1 hour, until it or Sofina dies, or until Sofina dismisses it as a bonus action.

traits.name: Aura of Protection
entries: Xenk and his allies within 10 feet of him have advantage on saving throws.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Xenk makes three Daggersword attacks and uses Daggersword Flourish. He can replace Daggersword Flourish with Cleansing Touch if it's available.

actions.name: Daggersword
entries: Choose the attack that corresponds to the daggersword's current form (see Daggersword Shift below):

actions.name: Longsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage, or 9 (1d10 + 4) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 6 (1d12) radiant damage.

actions.name: Shortsword and Dagger
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 6 (1d12) radiant damage.

actions.name: Daggersword Flourish
entries: Choose the option that corresponds to the daggersword's current form (see Daggersword Shift below):

actions.name: Longsword
entries: Xenk magically detaches the longsword's blade from its hilt, launching the blade at a creature he can see within 30 feet of himself. The target must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the target is impaled by the blade, taking 14 (3d6 + 4) piercing damage, and is knocked prone. At the end of the current turn, the blade magically reattaches to its hilt.

actions.name: Shortsword and Dagger
entries: Xenk lashes out with both weapons. Each creature of his choice within 10 feet of him must make a DC 16 Dexterity throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 7 (2d6) piercing damage and has disadvantage on attack rolls until the start of Xenk's next turn. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and suffers no other effect.

actions.name: Cleansing Touch (1/Day)
entries: Xenk touches a creature within 5 feet of himself. The target magically regains 27 (6d8) hit points and gains the benefit of a lesser restoration spell.

bonusActions.name: Daggersword Shift
entries: Xenk changes the form of his daggersword, choosing one of the following forms: a longsword, or a shortsword in one hand and a dagger in the other.
